dimensions.priority: P1 — available on newer hardware, high user value

dimensions.priority: P1 — easy HealthKit read, illness detection signal

dimensions.priority: P1 — easy HealthKit read, sleep apnea signal

dimensions.name: Muscular Load Tracking
dimensions.priority: P2 — differentiator for strength training users

dimensions.name: Sleep Debt & Personalized Sleep Need
dimensions.priority: P1 — high user value, no new data needed

dimensions.name: Sleep Consistency Score
dimensions.priority: P1 — already have the data in SmartNudgeScheduler, just need to surface it

dimensions.name: Menstrual & Hormonal Insights
dimensions.priority: P2 — important for female users, needs careful clinical framing

dimensions.name: Social & Community
dimensions.priority: P3 — Family tier exists but no features built. Long-term retention play

dimensions.name: Sleep Stage Breakdown
dimensions.priority: P1 — Apple Watch already writes stage data, just need to read and display

dimensions.name: AI Conversational Coach
dimensions.hardwareRequired: none (on-device LLM or Apple Intelligence API)
dimensions.priority: P2 — major differentiator, but significant engineering effort

dimensions.name: Daily Strain Score
dimensions.hardwareRequired: none (computed from existing HR zone data)
dimensions.priority: P1 — Thump already has zone data, needs composite scoring

dimensions.name: Resilience / CV Age / Longevity
dimensions.priority: P2 — Bio Age is competitive, add stress-recovery bounce-back metric

thumpStrengths: Bio Age (NTNU-based, 6-input, per-metric breakdown) — ahead of WHOOP, near Oura
5-zone HR analysis with per-zone targets — ahead of Oura (ring can't do HR zones)
Coaching copy quality — data-backed, hedged, baseline-anchored language
Stress heatmap (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly) — more granular than both competitors
Context-aware stress engine (acute vs desk mode) — unique to Thump
Readiness with 5-pillar breakdown + cap logic — transparent scoring
Correlation analysis (activity ↔ metrics) — not available in WHOOP or Oura free tier
Privacy: all health data on-device — stronger than WHOOP (cloud-first)

P1_quickWins.description: Close 5 gaps using data Apple Watch already writes to HealthKit — no new hardware needed

items.impact: Closes gap 6 → 0. Apple Watch writes .asleepCore/.asleepDeep/.asleepREM since watchOS 9. Read stages, display stacked bar + percentages, compare to optimal ranges.
Closes gap 7 → 0. SmartNudgeScheduler already computes wake patterns. Surface as user-visible metric + chart.
Closes gap 8 → 2. Read .respiratoryRate, show on Trends chart, use for illness detection.
Closes gap 8 → 2. Read .oxygenSaturation, show on Trends chart, flag drops below 95%.
Closes gap 7 → 1. Build SleepDebtEngine from existing sleep + HRV data. Show debt counter + tonight's target.

P1_medium.description: Build new engines from existing data

items.impact: Closes gap 6 → 1. Composite cardiovascular load from existing zone minutes. Logarithmic 0-20 scale.
Closes gap 9 → 1 (on Series 8+). Read .appleSleepingWristTemperature, show deviation. Graceful degradation on older watches.
Phase 1 ('Why?' taps) = 3 days. Full conversational coach = 2-4 weeks.
Read .menstrualFlow, adjust readiness for luteal phase. Needs careful medical framing.
Infer strength load from HKWorkout metadata. Unique vs Oura (ring can't do this).
Add stress-recovery bounce-back speed metric alongside Bio Age.

P3_longTerm.description: Social features and community — retention play

items.impact: Family dashboard, shared streaks, opt-in weekly challenges. Needs backend infrastructure.
